notes: CDN-available libraries for general-purpose frontend concept generation. Subagents pick 0-5 libraries per pass based on style fit and pass needs. Libraries are OPTIONAL — pure CSS is always valid. Three.js MUST use v0.160.0 (v0.170.0+ dropped UMD builds).

3d-rendering.description: WebGL and 3D rendering libraries for globes, scenes, and visual effects

libraries.name: Three.js
libraries.note: CRITICAL: Use v0.160.0 specifically. v0.170.0+ dropped UMD/IIFE builds and require ES module bundlers.
libraries.purpose: 3D globe rendering, wireframe geometry, particle systems, atmospheric shaders

libraries.name: Zdog
libraries.purpose: Lightweight pseudo-3D engine for illustrations and icons

animation.description: Animation engines for timelines, scroll effects, and choreography

libraries.name: GSAP
libraries.purpose: Complex animation timelines, scroll-driven choreography, spring physics

libraries.name: Anime.js
libraries.purpose: Lightweight staggered animations, SVG path drawing, timeline sequences

libraries.name: AOS (Animate On Scroll)
libraries.purpose: Zero-config scroll reveal via data attributes

scroll.description: Smooth scrolling and scroll behavior libraries

libraries.name: Lenis
libraries.purpose: Premium smooth-scroll with inertia. Luxury feel for premium aesthetics.

libraries.name: SortableJS
libraries.purpose: Drag-to-reorder for kanban cards, lists, directory trees

libraries.name: Tippy.js
libraries.purpose: Polished tooltips and popovers for contextual info

libraries.name: Swiper
libraries.purpose: Touch-friendly carousel and slider for galleries and card browsing

visual-effects.description: Particle systems, animated backgrounds, SVG effects

libraries.name: tsParticles
libraries.purpose: Ambient particle backgrounds. Use sparingly — 20-50 particles max.

libraries.name: Vivus
libraries.purpose: SVG line-drawing animation for decorative illustrations

libraries.name: Splitting.js
libraries.purpose: Per-character CSS animation for hero headlines and text reveals

libraries.name: Typed.js
libraries.purpose: Typewriter text animation for chat interfaces and terminal aesthetics

data-visualization.description: Chart and data rendering libraries (for dashboard/analytics concepts)

libraries.name: Chart.js
libraries.purpose: Responsive charts for dashboard stat cards and analytics views

libraries.name: D3.js
libraries.purpose: Custom data visualizations, force graphs, treemaps
